auth.enterPhone: Enter your registered phone number to receive an OTP.
auth.enterPhonePrompt: Enter your phone number to continue.
auth.familyMemberDescription: You are registered as a family member under {{name}}.
auth.familyMemberHint: To use this app independently, please ask {{name}} to remove you from their family member list.
auth.familyStep1: Contact {{name}} and ask them to open their app.
auth.familyStep2: They can tap Settings → Family Members and remove you.
auth.familyStep3: Once removed, tap Retry below to continue.
auth.workspaceErrorDesc: We couldn't complete your account setup. Please try again or sign out.
auth.preparingWorkspaceDesc: Validating your account and building your workspace...
auth.settingUpDesc: This will only take a moment...
auth.phoneNumberPrompt: Enter your phone number to continue.
auth.accountNotRegistered: Your account is not registered. Enter your church code to join.
auth.confirmCheckboxRequired: Please check the confirmation box to proceed.
auth.otpSentSuccess: OTP sent! Check your phone and enter the code below.
auth.otpVoiceSent: We're calling you with the code. Please pick up the phone.
auth.otpResendIn: You can resend the code in {{seconds}}s
auth.otpVoiceHint: Not getting the SMS? Wait for the timer, then ask us to call you with the code instead.
auth.adminWorkspaceReady: Welcome back. Admin workspace is ready.
auth.memberDashboardReady: Welcome back. Member dashboard is ready.
auth.familyMemberBlocked: Your account is registered as a family member.

dashboard.subtitle: It's a beautiful day in the sanctuary. Here's what's happening in your community today.
dashboard.prayerDescription: Let our community lift you up. Share your heart with us.
dashboard.donationDescription: Support our mission. Every gift makes a difference.
dashboard.subscriptionDescription: Set your monthly subscription amount to get started. Once saved, it will appear in your dues for immediate payment.
dashboard.paymentSummaryDesc: Review your selected subscriptions before proceeding to payment.
dashboard.onboardingStep1: Your admin will assign a subscription amount for you.
dashboard.onboardingStep2: Once assigned, your dues will appear at the top — tap Pay Now to pay online.
dashboard.onboardingStep3: Visit Profile to update your personal details and add family members.
dashboard.subscriptionSetByAdmin: Your subscription amount is set by your church admin.
dashboard.platformFeeDesc: Platform fee for your church's access to the platform.
dashboard.noPlatformSubscription: No platform subscription has been assigned to your church yet. Contact the super admin.
dashboard.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to cancel?
dashboard.cancellationRequestSubmitted: Cancellation request submitted. Your admin will review it.
dashboard.errorCheckoutLoadFailed: Unable to load Razorpay checkout. Please retry.
dashboard.errorCheckoutUnavailable: Razorpay checkout is unavailable in this browser.
dashboard.verificationPending: Payment was received but verification is temporarily unavailable. It will be confirmed shortly. DO NOT pay again.
dashboard.errorHistoryLoadFailed: Failed to load SaaS payment history.
dashboard.errorNotAvailableSuperAdmin: Subscription payments are not available in super admin workspace.
dashboard.errorNoSubscriptionSelected: Select at least one subscription to pay.

history.heading: History
history.subtitle: A complete record of your contributions and community dues. Detailed receipts are available for your records.
history.exportDescription: Export your contribution history for tax purposes or personal records.
history.errorSignInAgain: Please sign in again to download receipts.

events.prayerDescription: Select at least one pastor and share your prayer request details.
events.noPastors: No active pastors configured for your church.
events.prayerPlaceholder: Share what you want the pastors to pray for
events.prayerCallToAction: Need prayer? Submit a prayer request and a pastor will pray for you.

prayer.heroDescription: Our community is here for you. Choose a pastor to share your prayer request with, and they will personally lift your intentions in prayer.
prayer.generalDescription: Send your request to all pastors in your church community. They will lift your intentions in prayer.
prayer.noPastors: No pastors are available at this time. Please check back later.
prayer.dialogDescription: Your request will be shared with {{target}}. Everything you share is kept confidential.
prayer.requestSentDescription: Your prayer request has been shared. Our pastors will lift your intentions in prayer.
prayer.errorSelectLeader: Select at least one leader first.
prayer.successSubmitted: Prayer request sent to selected leader(s).

donation.heroDescription: Join us in building a vibrant community rooted in faith, love, and service. Every gift, no matter the size, makes a lasting impact.
donation.leaveMsgPlaceholder: Leave a message or prayer request...
donation.fullTransparencyDesc: Track how your gift makes an impact
donation.footer: Shalom Church Management · Secure payments powered by Razorpay
donation.confirmTagline: Your generosity fuels our mission. Review your donation details below.
donation.termsNotice: By completing this payment, you agree to our terms of service. All donations are non-refundable.
donation.thankYouDesc: Your gift of ₹{{amount}} towards {{fund}} has been received. Your generosity fuels our mission and strengthens our community.
donation.scriptureVerse: "Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

home.title: Welcome to Shalom
home.tagline: Church management made simple. Sign in to access your church community.
home.previewChurchHomeDesc: Select a diocese and church to see what their members see.
home.selectChurchToPreview: Select a church above to preview its home page

join.enterChurchCode: Signed in as {{identity}}. Enter your church's 8-digit code to continue.
join.codeRequired: Church code is required. Ask your church administrator for the code.
join.codeMustBe8Digits: Church code must be exactly 8 digits.

admin.churchLogoDescription: Upload or update your church's logo. This will be displayed on the home page.
admin.confirmActionDescription: You are about to run: {{label}}. Type {{keyword}} to authorize this protected action.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pushBlocked: Blocked by browser. Update in site settings.
settings.pushBlockedNotice: Notifications are blocked. Please allow them in your browser settings.
settings.pushFailed: Could not enable push notifications. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Request permanent deletion of your account and data.
settings.deleteRequestSent: Account deletion request sent to your church admin for review.
settings.deleteRequestFailed: Failed to submit deletion request. Please try again.
settings.deleteWarningTitle: Warning: This action has serious consequences
settings.deleteWarning1: All your membership records, payment history, and subscriptions will be permanently removed.
settings.deleteWarning2: Active subscriptions will be cancelled immediately.
settings.deleteWarning3: Family members linked to your account will be unlinked.
settings.deleteWarning4: This action cannot be undone once approved by your admin.
settings.deleteAdminNote: Your request will be sent to your church administrator for review. The admin will decide whether to approve or reject the deletion.
settings.deleteReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to delete your account?

banner.pushPrompt: 🔔 Enable push notifications to stay updated with announcements and reminders.
banner.installPrompt: 📱 Install this app to your home screen for push notifications and a better experience.
banner.installInstructions: Tap Share ↗ then "Add to Home Screen".
banner.pushBlocked: Notifications blocked. You can enable them in your browser settings.

cookie.message: This app uses essential cookies for authentication and session management.

activityLog.emptyDescription: Subscription events will appear here as they occur.

adminOps.emptyDescription: Search by name or email above.

accountDeletion.familyNote: This member has family members who will be unlinked
accountDeletion.approveMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the account of {{name}}? This will cancel their subscriptions, unlink {{familyCount}} family member(s), and permanently remove their membership. This cannot be undone.
accountDeletion.emptyDescription: Account deletion requests from members will appear here.

cancellationRequests.title: Cancellation Requests
cancellationRequests.description: Review subscription cancellation requests from members.

cancellationRequests.emptyDescription: Member cancellation requests will appear here for review.

createSubscription.description: Create a new subscription for a church member. Subscriptions start on the 5th of the month.

platformRazorpay.description: Configure the Razorpay API keys used to collect platform fees from churches. These keys belong to you (the platform owner). Churches will pay their platform subscription using these credentials.

platformRazorpay.statusNotConfigured: Not configured — set both Key ID and Key Secret to enable online SaaS payments

specialDates.includedChurchScoped: Church-scoped — only your church's data is included

explore.heroSub: From members and donations to events, subscriptions, and prayer requests — everything your church needs lives in one place. Simple for members, powerful for churches.
explore.checkChurch: Check if your church is on Shalom
explore.searchSub: Search by church name to see if your congregation has already joined the Shalom platform.
explore.churchAlreadyOnShalom: Your church is already on Shalom!
explore.notRegisteredYet: Your church might not be registered yet.
explore.whyIntro: Shalom is an all-in-one church management app that helps your church stay connected, organized, and future-ready. Built to bring your entire congregation closer together.
explore.contactTitle: Want your church listed on Shalom?
explore.contactSub: If your church isn't on Shalom yet, we'd love to help you get started. Reach out to us and we'll guide you through the simple onboarding process.
explore.mailSubject: Register our church on Shalom App
explore.mailBody:
Hello Shalom Team,

We would like to register our church on the Shalom App.

Church Name: 
Location: 
Contact Person: 
Phone: 

Thank you!
explore.footerCopy: © {{year}} Shalom. Built with ♥ for churches everywhere.
explore.memberFeatureLeadership: Know your church and diocese leadership.
explore.memberFeaturePastors: Reach your pastors anytime with ease.
explore.memberFeaturePrayer: Send prayer requests privately and quickly.
explore.memberFeatureDonation: Give offerings and donations in seconds.
explore.memberFeatureAlerts: Get regular alerts of your church programs.
explore.memberFeatureGreetings: Receive greetings on your special occasions.
explore.memberFeatureEvents: Never miss a church event or announcement.
explore.memberFeatureLanguage: Use the app in your own language.
explore.memberExtraProfile: Access your profile and subscriptions easily.
explore.memberExtraTrackPay: Track & Pay your subscription status anytime.
explore.memberExtraFamily: Pay your entire family's subscription together.
explore.memberExtraReceipts: Get instant receipts for every payment.
explore.memberExtraSecure: Keep your profile fully secure and private.
explore.churchFeatureDigital: Turn your church into a fully digital organization.
explore.churchFeatureMemberProfile: Access any member profile with one click.
explore.churchFeatureFinance: Get financial reports through powerful visual dashboards.
explore.churchFeatureExport: Download complete member details in Excel.
explore.churchFeatureNewsletter: Send info and updates with a single click.
explore.churchExtraOnTime: Receive subscriptions on time, every time.
explore.churchExtraFlexiDonations: Get donations easier with flexi payments.
explore.churchExtraFundsBank: Get 100% of funds directly to your bank.
explore.churchExtraControl: Maintain complete control over member accounts.

historyPage.title: Payment History
historyPage.subtitle: Subscription and donation activity for you and your family.
